This is the 3rd PR for exactly the same request with exactly the same
wording within 3 weeks!

Is there a special reason for this?  Especially considering that your
company is already listed on our website??

PR:	www/142851
http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult.html#Pendulosoftware


jkois
